name: Chili#1
recipeIngredient: 1 can (1-lb) kidney beans, drain and rinse
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a plastic colander in a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole.
2. Combine onion, green pepper, and crumbled ground beef in the colander.
3. Microwave on high (100% power) for 6 minutes, stirring once halfway through cooking.
4. Remove the colander and pour off any drippings.
5. Turn the meat mixture into the casserole dish.
6. Add tomato sauce, stewed tomatoes, beans, salt, chili powder, black pepper, and mustard.
7. Cover and microwave on high (100% power) for 10-12 minutes, stirring halfway through cooking.
8. Let it rest, covered, for 5 minutes before serving.
